s&p_500.note: 2026-05-01 close (Fri). Today futures -0.1~0.2% amid Iran tensions

nasdaq.note: Record high Fri; futures flat today

europe.note: Markets expected higher open on May 4. AI sentiment positive.

bitcoin.note: BTC broke above 0K briefly, highest since Jan

crypto.context: BTC up 15.66% over 30 days from 7,389. Yearly still -18.9% from 5K. Fear & Greed Index at 26.

commodities.oil: Spiked on Iran-Hormuz tensions. Iran claimed strike on US warship (denied by Pentagon). Strait blocked since late Feb.
commodities.note: Iran war continues to drive energy price shocks

geopolitics.iran_hormuz: Iran blocked Strait of Hormuz since late Feb. Iran claimed striking US warship May 4 (US denied). Trump announced Hormuz plan but shipping remains at near-standstill.
geopolitics.ecb: ECB rate hike in June all but inevitable per Kazimir, due to Iran war inflation
geopolitics.trade: EU-Mercosur deal could hurt Canada beef. EU Made in Europe law sets up economic showdown with China.
geopolitics.austria_russia: Austria expelled 3 Russian diplomats over signals spying
